description_long: This is a six-wheeled armored combat vehicle with a low-profile turret mounted centrally on its roof, equipped with a long-barreled cannon and several antennae for communication. The hull is angular and robust, featuring sloped armor panels for increased ballistic protection, and the vehicle is painted in a green and tan camouflage pattern. The front of the vehicle is sharply angled, with a prominent gun barrel extending forward and reinforced armor around the turret. The sides display storage compartments and equipment mounts, while the rear has a grated panel, likely for engine ventilation, and additional armor. The wheels are large, rugged, and designed for off-road mobility, with deep treads for traction. No visible military insignia or numbers are present, and the vehicle appears to be designed for urban and rough terrain operations.
description: A six-wheeled armored combat vehicle with a central turret, long cannon, and green-tan camouflage, featuring sloped armor and rugged off-road tires.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, turret, cannon, and all six wheels with visible camouflage pattern.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the grated engine panel, rear armor, and the back two wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, and all six wheels, with visible storage compartments and equipment mounts.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the angled armor, central turret, and the prominent forward-facing cannon.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped steel armor plating, especially reinforced around the turret and front hull; thickness appears substantial.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland-style camouflage with irregular green and tan patches in a matte finish.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, designed for rugged terrain; no visible chains or special reinforcements.
